title: Project Miner Local Executor Closeout Intake
objective: Reduce PM/AI orchestration return-path friction by adding a browser-local executor closeout intake checklist to the Project Miner intake workbench, while preserving that the checklist is audit prep only and grants no acceptance, hosted proof, persistence, import, or production authority.
active_role: Technical Repo Authority / PM Product Coordinator / AI Orchestration Closeout Implementer
implemented_scope: Add a browser-local Local Executor Closeout Intake checklist to /pm-review/import-intake.
Persist closeout checklist state only in candidate-scoped browser localStorage.
Include closeout checklist state in the browser-local PM brief.
Include checked and open closeout evidence in the browser-local executor handoff.
Extend the focused import-intake smoke to prove localStorage state, clear behavior, exported content, exact four read seams, zero mutation calls, and no approve/persist/submit/import controls.
Update PM lane operating docs, project status, packet, and handoff.
allowed_actions: Modify the local operations-web import-intake page.
Update PM lane operating docs, project status, packet, and handoff.
Use one read-only sidecar scout for closeout-intake boundary and checklist review.
Run focused local validation, commit, push, and restore host parity.
not_allowed: No DNS, auth, ingress, or secret change.
validation_steps: corepack pnpm --dir apps/operations-web exec playwright test tests/browser-shell.pm-import-intake.smoke.spec.ts

corepack pnpm --dir apps/operations-web exec playwright test tests/browser-shell.pm-import-candidate.smoke.spec.ts tests/browser-shell.pm-import-admission-plan.smoke.spec.ts tests/browser-shell.pm-import-approval-readiness.smoke.spec.ts tests/browser-shell.pm-import-intake.smoke.spec.ts
validation_results: operations-web typecheck passed after correcting helper signatures.
operations-web production build passed with /pm-review/import-intake in the route output.
Focused import-intake Playwright smoke passed with 1 passed after refreshing the production build.
Focused PM intake Playwright smoke suite passed with 4 passed.
Packet JSON parse passed with packet-json-ok.
git diff --check passed with line-ending normalization warnings only.
